message:
Add five new graph generators matching NetworkX API

Implement four new generator algorithms in fnx-generators and expose all
five new functions through the Python binding layer:

Core generators (fnx-generators):
- newman_watts_strogatz_graph: small-world variant that adds shortcut
  edges instead of rewiring, guaranteeing connectivity
- connected_watts_strogatz_graph: repeatedly generates Watts-Strogatz
  graphs (with incremented seeds) until a connected one is found via BFS
- random_regular_graph: k-regular graph via the pairing model with
  retry on multi-edges
- powerlaw_cluster_graph: Holme-Kim model extending Barabási-Albert
  with a triangle-closing step controlled by probability p

Python bindings (fnx-python):
- erdos_renyi_graph: convenience alias for gnp_random_graph
- newman_watts_strogatz_graph, connected_watts_strogatz_graph,
  random_regular_graph, powerlaw_cluster_graph: direct wrappers
- All five registered in the module's pyfunction table

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
